landing.tagBadge: AI career assistant for students and early-career professionals
landing.headline: Perfect your CV, land the right job, and ace interviews — all in one place.
landing.subtext: CV MENTOR — Polish your resume, match top roles, and master interviews.
landing.cvAnalysisDesc: Upload your CV for instant, actionable AI feedback on layout, completeness, and wording.
landing.jobMatchingDesc: The system automatically suggests jobs that fit your CV.
landing.mockInterviewDesc: Practice tailored technical and behavioral questions and get detailed AI scoring and guidance.
landing.contactSubtitle: Get in touch with the development team for inquiries and feedback.
landing.cvAnalysisCardDesc: Get structured feedback, scores, strengths, and weaknesses.
landing.jobMatchingCardDesc: Matches your CV content with job descriptions to find suitable roles.
landing.mockInterviewCardDesc: Generate role-specific questions and receive AI-evaluated answers.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: This dashboard shows your CV reports, available job opportunities, and quick actions to continue matching.
dashboard.reportsDesc: AI-generated resume reports are securely stored to power smarter job matching and recommendations.
dashboard.jobsDesc: Numerous job opportunities are waiting to be discovered.
dashboard.targetRoleDesc: Ready to evaluate how well your profile matches specific job descriptions..
dashboard.noReports: No CV reports yet. Upload your first resume to start the flow.
dashboard.analyzeCVDesc: Get detailed feedback on your resume content, skills, and presentation to increase your chances of getting hired.
dashboard.matchJobsDesc: Explore job opportunities that best match your experience, skills, and career background.
dashboard.noSavedJobs: No saved jobs yet. Find matches or search and save jobs to see them here.
dashboard.mockInterviewDesc: Practice answering mock interview questions via text or voice with a virtual AI interviewer.

cvAnalysis.title: Upload a CV and get structured AI feedback
cvAnalysis.desc: The system extracts the text, asks AI Mentor to evaluate it with standard criteria, creates an embedding, and stores both the report and vector in the database.
cvAnalysis.dragDrop: Drag & drop your CV file here, or
cvAnalysis.jdDesc: Paste the JD here to calculate a target compatibility score and find skills gaps.
cvAnalysis.jdPlaceholder: Paste the target job description here...
cvAnalysis.waitingDesc: Your detailed AI resume report and scoring breakdown will show up here.

jobRec.title: Smart Job Recommendations
jobRec.desc: Select one of your uploaded resumes. The AI system will automatically match your profile with all job postings to suggest the best opportunities.
jobRec.selectDesc: Choose a resume to search for matching jobs.
jobRec.dragDropOrClick: Drag & drop CV file (.pdf, .docx) or click to upload
jobRec.instantAnalysis: Instant CV analysis to match job positions
jobRec.noCVs: No CVs found in your profile.
jobRec.matchingEmb: AI is analyzing and matching jobs...
jobRec.clickDetails: Click to see details & score fit →
jobRec.noRecommendations: No recommendations yet. Select a resume and click Recommend Jobs.

jobSearch.title: Search Jobs by Keywords
jobSearch.desc: Search our database of job postings using keywords (such as job title, company name, skills) and optional location filters.
jobSearch.filtersDesc: Enter search criteria to find relevant job opportunities.
jobSearch.locationPlaceholder: e.g. Ha Noi, Ho Chi Minh...
jobSearch.noJobs: No jobs found. Enter keywords and click Search Jobs.

cvHistory.title: CV Analysis History
cvHistory.desc: View, analyze, and manage your evaluated CV reports. You can delete individual reports or perform batch deletion.
cvHistory.emptyDesc: You haven't uploaded or analyzed any CVs yet. Upload your first resume to receive AI feedback and career opportunities.
cvHistory.confirmSingle: Are you sure you want to delete CV analysis report
cvHistory.confirmBatch: Are you sure you want to delete
cvHistory.confirmBatchSuffix: selected CV analysis report(s)? This action will permanently remove them.

savedJobs.title: Saved Jobs
savedJobs.desc: Jobs you saved from Match Jobs and Search Jobs pages. You can view details or remove from your list.
savedJobs.emptyDesc: You haven't saved any jobs. Search or match jobs and click ♡ to save.

auth.loginDesc: Welcome back to CV MENTOR. Enter your credentials to continue.
auth.registerDesc: Sign up to get personalized AI career guidance and resume matching.

mockInterview.title: AI Mock Interview Simulator
mockInterview.desc: Practice interviewing in real-time with a virtual interviewer. Receive immediate evaluations for every answer and a comprehensive final report.
mockInterview.micStatusActive: Recording your answer... Speak now. Click stop when finished or wait for auto-recognition.
mockInterview.micStatusTranscribing: AI is transcribing your voice... Please wait.

profile.title: Account Profile
profile.newPasswordLength: New password must be at least 8 characters long

about.title: Project Introduction
about.subtitle: Course SSB201 – Advanced Business Communication | FPT University
about.paragraph1: CV Mentor is a course project of SSB201 – Advanced Business Communication at FPT University, completed by Group 01 under the guidance of lecturer Ms. Nguyen Minh Hoa. The project team consists of 07 members: Ngo Van Viet, Nguyen Thi Thu Thuy, Vu Mai Linh, Le Duc Phong, Tran Thi Xuan, Tran Trung Hieu, and Nguyen Ngoc Linh.
about.paragraph2: The project aims to develop an AI-powered platform to assist students in building CVs and preparing job applications. By analyzing the content, layout, skills, and experiences on a CV, the system provides appropriate assessments and edit suggestions, helping users refine their CVs professionally and better meet recruiters' requirements.
about.paragraph3: CV Mentor was born from the fact that many students have academic, extracurricular, personal project, or part-time work experience but struggle to showcase and highlight those values on their CVs. In addition to AI resume analysis, the project integrates features like smart job recommendations, career orientation, and mock interviews, delivering a comprehensive solution for students preparing to apply.
about.visionDesc: CV Mentor aims to become an intelligent, accessible, and market-aligned platform that supports students in resume building and application readiness.
about.missionDesc: The project strives to help students discover their strengths, improve their resume quality, and boost confidence in seeking internships and jobs.
about.footerMessage: Under the slogan 'Better CV, closer opportunities', CV Mentor is not just a resume editing tool but also a companion that helps students improve resume building skills, gain confidence, and access digital-era job markets.
